body.title: Implement DISTILLATION Engram pattern
body.result: Phase 1 complete: EPISODIC->EXPERIENTIAL->PROCEDURAL pipeline live in distillation.py, wired in main.py, 1747 EXPERIENTIAL nodes in DB. Phase 2 (FACTUAL->INTERPRETIVE compression) split to T-factual-compression per Igor's recommendation.
body.description: Periodic pass that groups thin FACTUAL deposits on the same concept and collapses them into a single richer INTERPRETIVE node. Compresses growing matrix into actual inference capability rather than storage growth. The missing flywheel closer (Engram language crystallization, 2026-03-22).
